metadata.description: Existing VNet resource ID (optional). If set, existing VNet path is used.
Foundry account name (must be globally unique)
Optional comma-separated public IPv4/CIDR allow-list for Foundry portal/API access. Empty keeps Foundry fully private.
Network ACL bypass mode for Foundry account (None or AzureServices).
Existing Cosmos DB account resource ID (optional)
Subscription ID where existing private DNS zones are located. Leave empty for current subscription.
DNS zone map: zone name -> resource group. Empty value means create zone in current resource group.
Enable Azure Firewall + UDR controlled egress
Deploy project capability host and post-capability-host role assignments

parameters.storageAccountName: [if(reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('validate-existing-{0}', variables('shortSuffix'))), '2022-09-01').outputs.azureStorageExists.value, createObject('value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('validate-existing-{0}', variables('shortSuffix'))), '2022-09-01').outputs.azureStorageName.value), createObject('value', parameters('storageAccountName')))]
parameters.searchServiceName: [if(reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('validate-existing-{0}', variables('shortSuffix'))), '2022-09-01').outputs.aiSearchExists.value, createObject('value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('validate-existing-{0}', variables('shortSuffix'))), '2022-09-01').outputs.aiSearchName.value), createObject('value', parameters('searchServiceName')))]
parameters.cosmosAccountName: [if(reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('validate-existing-{0}', variables('shortSuffix'))), '2022-09-01').outputs.cosmosDBExists.value, createObject('value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('validate-existing-{0}', variables('shortSuffix'))), '2022-09-01').outputs.cosmosDBName.value), createObject('value', parameters('cosmosAccountName')))]

metadata.description: Optional comma-separated public IPv4/CIDR allow-list for Foundry portal/API access. Empty keeps Foundry fully private.
Network ACL bypass mode for Foundry account. Use AzureServices when portal blades (for example Agents) require trusted Azure service access.
Object mapping DNS zone names to resource group names. Empty value means create zone in current resource group.
Subscription ID for existing DNS zones. Empty means current subscription.

id.value: [resourceId('Microsoft.Network/privateDnsZones/virtualNetworkLinks', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('zoneName'), parameters('linkName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('zoneName'), parameters('linkName')), '/')[1])]

[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/privateDnsZones/virtualNetworkLinks', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('zoneName'), parameters('linkName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('zoneName'), parameters('linkName')), '/')[1])]

[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/privateDnsZones/virtualNetworkLinks', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('zoneName'), parameters('linkName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('zoneName'), parameters('linkName')), '/')[1])]

[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/privateDnsZones/virtualNetworkLinks', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('zoneName'), parameters('linkName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('zoneName'), parameters('linkName')), '/')[1])]

[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/privateDnsZones/virtualNetworkLinks', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('zoneName'), parameters('linkName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('zoneName'), parameters('linkName')), '/')[1])]

[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/privateDnsZones/virtualNetworkLinks', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('zoneName'), parameters('linkName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('zoneName'), parameters('linkName')), '/')[1])]

metadata.description: Public IP name for Azure Firewall
Enable minimal outbound egress rules for management subnet traffic
CIDR prefixes for subnets that should egress through firewall

properties.applicationRuleCollections: [if(and(parameters('enableEgressRules'), not(empty(parameters('sourceSubnetPrefixes')))), createArray(createObject('name', 'allow-subnet-https-egress', 'properties', createObject('priority', 200, 'action', createObject('type', 'Allow'), 'rules', createArray(createObject('name', 'allow-https-any-fqdn', 'sourceAddresses', parameters('sourceSubnetPrefixes'), 'protocols', createArray(createObject('protocolType', 'Https', 'port', 443)), 'targetFqdns', createArray('*')))))), createArray())]
properties.networkRuleCollections: [if(and(parameters('enableEgressRules'), not(empty(parameters('sourceSubnetPrefixes')))), createArray(createObject('name', 'allow-subnet-dns-egress', 'properties', createObject('priority', 210, 'action', createObject('type', 'Allow'), 'rules', createArray(createObject('name', 'allow-azure-dns', 'sourceAddresses', parameters('sourceSubnetPrefixes'), 'destinationAddresses', createArray('168.63.129.16'), 'destinationPorts', createArray('53'), 'protocols', createArray('TCP', 'UDP')))))), createArray())]
